items.title: Damian Lillard and Ja Morant can’t win playing together
items.author: TrueHoop
items.body_excerpt: We just saw a masterclass in the NBA’s new defensive intensity. Amazingly, almost every rotation player from the Thunder, Spurs, and Knicks is either an excellent defender or Jalen Brunson (who’s at the very least a feisty one). There doesn’t seem to be a way to contend with two…

items.title: Been saying for weeks that LeBron James, at 41, is not seeking the highest possible salary. He's a billionaire. An NBA paycheck is a fraction of his income. Other factors will drive his decision about where to play in 2027-28.
items.author: Monte Poole
items.body_excerpt:
Been saying for weeks that LeBron James, at 41, is not seeking the highest possible salary. He's a billionaire. An NBA paycheck is a fraction of his income. Other factors will drive his decision about where to play in 2027-28.

The Warriors are very much in play.

items.title: Aaron Nola has a 6.00+ ERA through 17 GS in consecutive seasons. Players his age or older who have done this are essentially finished. Of the 6 other pitchers to do this, 3 never pitched again in subsequent seasons. The 3 who did pitch combined for a little over 115 IP and negati
items.author: Mike Lynch
items.body_excerpt: Aaron Nola has a 6.00+ ERA through 17 GS in consecutive seasons. Players his age or older who have done this are essentially finished. Of the 6 other pitchers to do this, 3 never pitched again in subsequent seasons. The 3 who did pitch combined for a little over 115 IP and negative WAR. Oof

items.title: The Celtics do not, by any means, have to trade Jaylen. He might be pissed. Maybe he’s ready to go. But he’s a true pro under contract for three more years. Anyone saying they must trade him is exaggerating, getting info from agents/other teams, desperate for content, or all thre
items.author: Chad Finn
items.body_excerpt: The Celtics do not, by any means, have to trade Jaylen. He might be pissed. Maybe he’s ready to go. But he’s a true pro under contract for three more years. Anyone saying they must trade him is exaggerating, getting info from agents/other teams, desperate for content, or all three.
